title: [Wizard Guild, Shaft Top]
description: The shaft reaches its highest point here, capped by a stone dome.  A narrow causeway is poised over open air, leading to a polished faenor door.

wayto.18054: ;e 40.times { sleep 0.1; break if GameObj.loot.any? { |obj| obj.name =~ /#{Char.name} disk$/ } }; unless GameObj.loot.any? { |obj| obj.name =~ /#{Char.name} disk$/ }; disk = Spell[511]; wait_until { disk.affordable? }; disk.cast; end; move 'down'
